recon.description: Passive recon workflow for bug bounty -- no active scanning

commands.cmd: dig $DOMAIN A +short && dig $DOMAIN MX +short && dig $DOMAIN TXT +short
commands.comment: DNS records -- reveals stack, email provider, SPF/DMARC
HTTP headers + redirect chain -- technology fingerprinting
historical URLs from Wayback Machine -- deleted endpoints
disallowed paths -- often the most interesting ones
IP resolution + exposure check via Shodan
